finding_results.notes: Tommy now sees Martin take the pill while coming out of the upstairs shared bathroom and heading back down to the canonical first-floor green room. After taking the remaining pills from the master bedroom, he retreats to the green room off the hall, watches Doug come down from the shared upstairs bathroom, and re-enters the morning scene from that first-floor room.

The chapter keeps one clear failed locker-room coaching beat in the first morning exchange. The later pre-flush turn no longer repeats Tommy giving orders and being mocked; it now pivots on Joel's warning that county scrutiny is imminent, which creates a concrete time cost and sends Tommy to the bathroom.

summary: Revised Chapter 3 to restore the continuity-safe first-floor green room geography for Tommy and to replace the second post-dawn coaching loop with a new imminent-scrutiny beat that drives the flush.
